seo_description: Calculadora de Raíces (√) rápida y fiable. Introduce tus medidas y consigue resultados al instante, directamente en tu navegador.
example_label: Find the cube root (³√) of 125 for solving cubic equations

range_hints.numero: Must be non-negative for even indices; typical: 1-10,000

result_context: The resultado ({resultado}) is the number that, when raised to the power of indice, equals the original número.

steps.description: Identify numero (125) and indice (3 for cube root)

mistakes: Trying to find even roots (square, 4th) of negative numbers in real domain
Confusing root index with the result value
Not recognizing that square root is index 2 (default)
